chunks.title: Job's Oath of Integrity
chunks.reason: Job swears by God to maintain his righteousness and silence until death.

chunks.title: Hope of the Wicked and Rebuke of Friends
chunks.reason: Job questions the hope of the godless and challenges his friends' vanity.

chunks.title: Portion of the Wicked Man
chunks.reason: A detailed description of the inevitable destruction and loss suffered by the wicked.
